narration: Science has a clearer story about case control studies than social media does.
visual_description: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about case control studies than social media does.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about case control studies than social media does.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about case control studies than social media does.

narration: Case control studies look backward to find causes of outcomes by comparing those with a condition to those without.
visual_description: Context visual: Case control studies look backward to find causes of outcomes by comparing those with a condition to those without.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Case control studies look backward to find causes of outcomes by comparing those with a condition to those without.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Case control studies look backward to find causes of outcomes by comparing those with a condition to those without.

narration: But do they always tell us the whole story? Not quite. There are limits.
visual_description: Escalation visual: But do they always tell us the whole story? Not quite. There are limits.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But do they always tell us the whole story? Not quite. There are limits.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But do they always tell us the whole story? Not quite. There are limits.

narration: These studies rely on memory and data from the past, which can lead to biases.
visual_description: Evidence visual: These studies rely on memory and data from the past, which can lead to biases.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: These studies rely on memory and data from the past, which can lead to biases.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: These studies rely on memory and data from the past, which can lead to biases.

narration: So while they help us understand risks, they’re not foolproof.
